This directory contains a sanitized subsystem source view for baseline analysis.

Directory structure:

- `piton/design/chip/tile/ariane/openpiton/`: integration-level peripheral wiring.
- `piton/design/chip/tile/ariane/src/`: local RTL wrappers included for this source view.
